name: Chiles Relleno /Meat Stuffed
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast and peel the chiles.
2. Cook the beef in 4 cups of boiling salted water until done, then grind it in a processor without making it too fine.
3. In a pan, add the ground meat, raisins, onions, garlic salt, cloves, and crushed coriander seeds. Mix well and let simmer for a few minutes until thickened.
4. Add the grated cheese to the mixture and mix thoroughly.
5. Separate the eggs; beat the whites very stiff.
6. Beat the yolks separately until stiff and gently fold them into the beaten whites.
7. Gradually add the flour to the egg mixture, mixing well.
8. Stuff the meat mixture into the peeled and cleaned chiles.
9. Dip each stuffed chile into the batter.
10. Fry in small amounts of oil on medium heat (375°F) until golden brown.
